zh.lifeSummary: 當William FitzWilliam of Sprotborough於大約1417年出生在英國越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯時，他的父親Sir John FitzWilliam21歲，母親Margaret Clarell22歲。他和Elizabeth de Chaworth至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1474年12月1日在英國英格蘭越可爾享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素斯 越可爾斯普洛特布盧。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William FitzWilliam of Sprotborough was born about 1417, in Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John FitzWilliam, was 21 and his mother, Margaret Clarell, was 22. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Elizabeth de Chaworth. He died on 1 December 1474, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Sprotbrough, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Elizabeth de Chaworth. Il est décédé le 1 décembre 1474, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Sprotbrough, South Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Sprotborough, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스프로트브루그h 앤드 커스워스
ko.lifeSummary: William FitzWilliam of Sprotborough(이)가 대략 1417년 영국 요르크실르 스프로트브루그h 앤드 커스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John FitzWilliam(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Clarell(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Elizabeth de Chaworth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1474년 12월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 소우스 요르크실르 스프로트브루그h에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William FitzWilliam of Sprotborough родился около 1417 г. в местности спротброую анд кусворт, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John FitzWilliam было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Clarell, 22. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Elizabeth de Chaworth. Он умер 1 декабря 1474 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности спротброую, соут еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
